title: Greenidge Generation 2025 Profit Turn and Debt Slashing - AI/HPC Pivot
text: Greenidge Generation 2025 Preliminary Results and Strategic Pivot. Financial Turnaround: Total Revenue $58.8 million. Net Income $4.2-5.2 million (improvement of $24.0-25.0 million versus 2024). EBITDA $19.9-20.9 million. Full Year Revenue Breakdown: Cryptocurrency Mining Revenue $15.2 million. Power and Capacity Revenue $22.2 million. Datacenter Hosting Revenue $21.5 million. Debt Reduction Achievement: Senior unsecured debt reduced from $68.5 million to $36.7 million. Total debt reduced to $39.0 million. Cash holdings $19.6 million. Bitcoin holdings valued at approximately $6.5 million (74 BTC). Net debt reduction to $12.9 million. Strategic Pivot to AI/HPC: Secured agreements for 100MW of future non-curtailable power for datacenters. Initiated studies to access additional 200MW at Dresden facility. Shift from bitcoin mining toward AI/HPC infrastructure. Regulatory Progress: Agreement with New York State Department of Environmental Conservation (NYSDEC) for Dresden facility Title V Air Permit renewal. Five-year permit renewal with emissions levels consistent with New Yorks climate law.
